title: Multi-Camera Coordinated Intrusion
description: A suspect is seen entering the building lobby (CAM-04), then disappears. The agent must switch between cameras to track the suspect through the corridor (CAM-03), identify them arriving at the warehouse (CAM-02), classify the coordinated threat, and execute emergency escalation.

frames.description: Building entrance. A person in dark clothing enters through the glass doors quickly, bypassing the security desk while the guard is distracted.
Building entrance. The person has disappeared from the lobby. The security guard is looking at their phone, unaware.
Empty corridor. Building is after-hours. Lights are dimmed. No personnel visible.
Corridor. The person in dark clothing from the lobby is now visible, moving quickly through the hallway toward the warehouse wing.
Warehouse area. No unauthorised personnel visible yet. Equipment is in normal position.
Warehouse. The suspect from the corridor has arrived and is tampering with the high-value inventory cage. They have tools and are working on the lock.
